title: Another Year of Loving You
content: 🦄 If you are reading this, it means you have uncovered every single memory we've hidden away for this month.

Seeing all these moments together—the quiet dinners, the grand holidays, the silly casual days—reminds me of how incredibly lucky I am to share this journey with you. Each card isn't just a photograph; it's a testament to the beautiful life we are building together.
Thank you for every smile, every adventure, and every quiet moment we've shared. I cherish these memories more than words can say, and I cannot wait to create a thousand more with you.

I may not always say it perfectly, but being with you is one of the best things that has ever happened to me. You’ve given me so many moments I’ll never forget, and I look forward to creating so many more together.
On your birthday, I just want you to know how much you mean to me. I hope this year brings you happiness, dreams coming true, and everything your heart has been quietly wishing for.
And no matter what happens, I’ll always be here—beside you, supporting you, and loving you more each day. Happy birthday again, my girl. I love you 🦄.
